marta.name: Barkeep Marta
marta.personality: Warm but shrewd. Knows everyone's business. Protective of regulars. Speaks plainly with a hint of dry humor.
marta.dialogue_style: Plain-spoken with dry wit. Short sentences. Occasional sigh.
marta.knowledge: Local rumors, adventurer gossip, cellar problems, room rates, menu items. Knows about disappearances on the east road.

unfriendly: Room rates are 5 silver a night
indifferent: Room rates are 5 silver a night
friendly: Strange noises from the cellar lately
helpful: The cellar connects to old crypt tunnels
Saw a hooded figure lurking last week

marta.greeting: What can I get for you, traveler?

mode_prompts.chatting: Polishing a mug, eyeing the newcomer.
mode_prompts.bartering: Names fair prices but will haggle.

quest_data.brief: Clear the creatures from the cellar
quest_data.reward: 50gp and free room for a week

old_tom.name: Old Tom
old_tom.personality: Grizzled veteran who tells tall tales. Drinks too much. Surprisingly sharp when sober. Nostalgic about his adventuring days.
old_tom.dialogue_style: Rambling storyteller. Starts sentences with 'Back in my day...' Gruff but warm.
old_tom.knowledge: Old dungeon layouts, monster weaknesses, outdated adventuring tips. Claims to have fought a dragon once. Knows local history.

indifferent: The old crypt is north of town
friendly: The drake's lair had three exits
helpful: Secret passage behind the altar in the crypt
The old commander's sword is still down there

old_tom.greeting: Eh? Another young fool looking for glory? Pull up a chair.

mode_prompts.chatting: Nursing his ale, eyes distant with memory.
mode_prompts.warning: Grabs your arm with surprising strength.
mode_prompts.recruiting: Straightens up, a glint of the old fire in his eyes.

elara.name: Elara the Quiet
elara.personality: Speaks rarely but precisely. Observant. Seems to know more than she lets on. Slight elvish accent.
elara.dialogue_style: Cryptic and precise. Never uses two words where one will do. Pauses before speaking.
elara.knowledge: Arcane lore, regional geography, hidden passages. Will hint at quest hooks but never give straight answers.

unfriendly: A cold stare is all you receive
indifferent: The ley lines converge beneath this town
friendly: Not all who vanish on the east road are dead
There is old magic in the crypt
helpful: The hooded figure serves a lich awakening below
A ward stone in the crypt holds the binding

mode_prompts.chatting: Watches from beneath her hood, pale eyes glinting.
mode_prompts.warning: Her voice drops to barely a whisper.
mode_prompts.recruiting: Considers you with an appraising look.
